5.0.short_description: Range of azimuths to rotate the clump template randomly about

keywords.name: clump.distribute.bin
keywords.description: Specify the distributional properties of bin <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: clump.distribute.bin.density
keywords.description: The clump density that is 1 by default

keywords.name: clump.distribute.bin.elevation
keywords.description: Range of elevations to rotate the clump template randomly about

keywords.name: clump.distribute.bin.fishdistribution
keywords.description: The clump sizes are drawn from the distribution represented by the FISH function <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: clump.distribute.bin.gauss
keywords.description: Specify that the clump sizes are chosen from a Gaussian distribution with mean value (<a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: clump.distribute.bin.group
keywords.description: Specify that generated clumps or pebbles are given group name <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: clump.distribute.bin.size
keywords.description: Specify the size range to be used during generation

keywords.name: clump.distribute.bin.template
keywords.description: Name of the clump template to be used

keywords.name: clump.distribute.bin.tilt
keywords.description: Range of tilts to rotate the clump template randomly about

keywords.name: clump.distribute.bin.volumefraction
keywords.description: The volume fraction of clumps in this distibution

keywords.name: clump.distribute.box
keywords.description: Clumps will fully fall within this box, such that they will not overlap the box faces or edges

keywords.name: clump.distribute.diameter
keywords.description: Specify that the linear size used to scale the clumps is the volume equivalent diameter of a {disk in 2D; sphere in 3D}

keywords.name: clump.distribute.fishsize
keywords.description: The size used to scale the clumps while generating can be specified by the FISH function with name <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: clump.distribute.numbin
keywords.description: Number of distributions used to generate the assembly

keywords.name: clump.distribute.porosity
keywords.description: The final porosity is set to <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: clump.distribute.resolution
keywords.description: Optional resolution that can be used as a multiplicative factor of the size of each clump generated
